# Captain Key Largo

> Guided fishing and boating charters in Key Largo, Florida, run by Captain Brian Epstein. Tagline: "Fish With A Local."

## Business facts
- Owner/operator: Captain Brian Epstein, USCG 100 Ton Master captain
- Fishing the Upper Florida Keys since 1976; son of Bob Epstein, the Miami Herald's fishing editor
- Location: Key Largo, FL 33037 (Upper Florida Keys); meeting dock confirmed per trip
- Phone (call or text): (954) 326-7360
- Email: epstein23@gmail.com
- Boat: 2021 Sea Hunt 25' bay boat
- Related business: co-founder of The Poppa Wahoo Collective, Islamorada (https://crossfiber.github.io/poppa-wahoo/)

## Trips
- Backcountry and inshore fishing (Florida Bay flats and mangroves)
- Reef and offshore fishing (Atlantic side)
- Night trips: dusk to dawn fishing, bowfishing, in-season lobster and shrimp runs
- Snorkel, dive, and eco tours
- Dine by Water barhop cruise (waterfront restaurants by boat)
- Captain-for-a-day or week, on his boat or yours
- Rates quoted per trip; text (954) 326-7360

## Site
- https://crossfiber.github.io/captain-key-largo/
